title: Raccoon Removal in Old Westbury, NY | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Old Westbury, Long Island. Licensed experts servicing estates and residential properties. Same-day response available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Old Westbury's grand estates and wooded properties provide ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and outbuildings. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive raccoon removal services tailored to Old Westbury's unique residential landscape, ensuring humane extraction and permanent exclusion. Our licensed technicians protect your property from raccoon damage while maintaining the elegance and integrity of your home.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Long Island's North Shore, we understand the specific challenges Old Westbury homeowners face with wildlife intrusion on larger properties. Our team provides discreet, effective raccoon removal with guaranteed results and same-day emergency response for Old Westbury residents.
localContext: Old Westbury's historic estates, expansive gardens, and proximity to wooded areas near the SUNY Old Westbury campus create prime conditions for raccoon activity year-round. The village's large properties and mature trees offer raccoons ample nesting opportunities, making professional exclusion services essential for homeowners near Post Road and I.U. Willets Road.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Old Westbury typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and required repairs. Larger estates may require more extensive exclusion work, while single-entry scenarios cost less. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Old Westbury neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Old Westbury due to the area's large wooded lots, mature landscaping, and spacious properties. They frequently nest in attics, chimneys, and detached structures on estates throughout the village, especially during spring birthing season and winter months when they seek warm shelter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon emergency in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for Old Westbury residents experiencing urgent raccoon problems, including aggressive behavior, entry into living spaces, or raccoons with babies in attics. Our team typically arrives within 2-4 hours of your call during business hours and provides 24/7 emergency dispatch for critical situations.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane raccoon removal methods?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, legal removal methods including live trapping, one-way exclusion doors, and hands-on extraction when necessary. All raccoons are handled according to New York State wildlife regulations, and mothers with babies are kept together. We also provide full attic restoration and entry point sealing to prevent future intrusions.
